KeysToEntries.Vest_SksBallisticVest_Description: A covert ballistic vest designed to be worn under a uniform that offers protection against small arms fire, shrapnel, and edged weapons.
KeysToEntries.Vest_UnbrandedMolleVest_Description: An unbranded ballistic vest with MOLLE webbing. It provides basic soft‑armor protection and modular attachment points, but its effectiveness against high‑power rifle calibers is limited.
KeysToEntries.Vest_UnbrandedMolleVest_DarkOlive_Descri: An unbranded ballistic vest with MOLLE webbing. It provides basic soft‑armor protection and modular attachment points, but its effectiveness against high‑power rifle calibers is limited.
KeysToEntries.Vest_UnbrandedMolleVest_Lla_Description: An unbranded ballistic vest with MOLLE webbing. It provides basic soft‑armor protection and modular attachment points, but its effectiveness against high‑power rifle calibers is limited.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Commander_Navy_Description: The Commander Series 1 provides good protection against ballistic threats and fragmentation, featuring a Cordura carrier for enhanced durability and fully adjustable waist and shoulder straps for a perfect fit.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Commander_Black_Description: The Commander Series 1 provides good protection against ballistic threats and fragmentation, featuring a Cordura carrier for enhanced durability and fully adjustable waist and shoulder straps for a perfect fit.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Commander_Dark_Description: The Commander Series 1 provides good protection against ballistic threats and fragmentation, featuring a Cordura carrier for enhanced durability and fully adjustable waist and shoulder straps for a perfect fit.

KeysToEntries.Vest_Commander_MalayPirates_Description: The Commander Series 1 provides good protection against ballistic threats and fragmentation, featuring a Cordura carrier for enhanced durability and fully adjustable waist and shoulder straps for a perfect fit.

KeysToEntries.Vest_Commander_Boss_Description:
The Commander Series 1 provides good protection against ballistic threats and fragmentation, featuring a Cordura carrier for enhanced durability and fully adjustable waist and shoulder straps for a perfect fit.

This vest belongs to Malo "Grin" Luangrath, the leader of the armed group occupying Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_Un_Descrip: Extremely popular with international security organizations and law enforcement, the Covert Tactical Body Armour provides level IIIA ballistic protection according to the NIJ (National Institute of Justice) standard, safeguarding against most handgun threats. This particular UNLRA version doesn't feature any additional ballistic plates.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CoolmaxCovertVest_Description: A covert ballistic vest designed for low-profile use. Its special liner promotes airflow and dissipates body heat, reducing sweat buildup and making it well-suited for hot and humid environments.
KeysToEntries.Vest_LVSOvert_RangerGreen_Description: A lightweight, concealable body armor vest shaped to match the wearer’s body for comfort and reduced profile.
KeysToEntries.Vest_LVSTactical_RangerGreen_Description: A lightweight vest featuring a tactical cover which can support additional pouches and attachment points for modular equipment.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Hornet_LLA_Description: A Czech-made ballistic vest with pouches for additional armor plates.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Hornet_UN_Description: A Czech-made ballistic vest with pouches for additional armor plates.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Vip_Black_Description: Offers discreet ballistic protection for everyday use. Favored especially by bodyguards and security personnel.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Vip_Boss_Description:
Offers discreet ballistic protection for everyday use. Favored especially by bodyguards and security personnel.

This vest belongs to Hoang "Broker" Lam Nam, the leader of the armed group occupying Hunter's Paradise.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_BossPirate:
Extremely popular with international security organizations and law enforcement. The Covert Tactical Body Armour safeguards against most handgun threats.

This vest belongs to Sabtu "Naga" bin Panjang, the leader of the armed group occupying Ban Pa.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_Press_Desc: Extremely popular with international security organizations and law enforcement. The Covert Tactical Body Armour safeguards against most handgun threats.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_Police_Des: Extremely popular with international security organizations and law enforcement. The Covert Tactical Body Armour safeguards against most handgun threats.
KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_Woodland_D: Extremely popular with international security organizations and law enforcement. The Covert Tactical Body Armour safeguards against most handgun threats.
KeysToEntries.Vest_AtbvVest_Description: A Chinese-made ballistic vest with pouches for additional armor plates. Adjustable shoulder straps and a secure cummerbund allow for a customizable fit across most body types.
KeysToEntries.Vest_AtbvVest_Olive_Description: A Chinese-made ballistic vest with pouches for additional armor plates. Adjustable shoulder straps and a secure cummerbund allow for a customizable fit across most body types.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Krogan_Boss_Description:
The Krogan vest has an anatomical design that provides a snug and comfortable fit, making it suitable for covert operations.

This vest belongs to Sang "Kaptei" Samnang, the leader of the armed group occupying the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.Vest_Hornet_Green_Description: A Czech-made ballistic vest with pouches for additional armor plates.
KeysToEntries.Vest_6b231_Flora_Description: This ballistic vest is a part of the 6B23 series, designed to provide reliable protection for soldiers in various combat situations. It features an iconic "Flora" camouflage pattern, which is used by the Russian Armed Forces.
KeysToEntries.Vest_6b231_Digital_Description: This ballistic vest is a part of the 6B23 series, designed to provide reliable protection for soldiers in various combat situations. It features a digital camouflage pattern which helps the wearer to stay hidden thanks to its pixellated patterns.
KeysToEntries.Vest_6b231_BossLla_Description:
This ballistic vest is a part of the 6B23 series, designed to provide reliable protection for soldiers in various combat situations.

This vest belongs to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Vest_6b231_BossTB_Description:
This ballistic vest is a part of the 6B23 series, designed to provide reliable protection for soldiers in various combat situations.

This vest belongs to Palani "Colonel" Ketthavong, the military commander of Tiger Bay.

KeysToEntries.Vest_CovertTacticalBodyArmour_BossLla_De: [DEV] Ballistic vest worn by Lani Sayavong, leader of LLA.
